sentences.english: I'd never given much thought to how I would die.
sentences.chinese: 我从没多想过自己会怎样死去。
sentences.shadowing: I'd NEVER given much THOUGHT‿to HOW‿I would DIE. ↘︎

sentences.english: But dying in the place of someone I love seems like a good way to go.
sentences.chinese: 但为心爱的人而死，似乎是个不错的方式。
sentences.shadowing: But DYING‿in the PLACE‿of someone‿I LOVE / seems like‿a GOOD way‿to GO. ↘︎

sentences.english: So I can't bring myself to regret the decision to leave home.
sentences.chinese: 所以，我无法让自己后悔离家的决定。
sentences.shadowing: So‿I CAN'T bring myself‿to REGRET / the DECISION‿to LEAVE HOME. ↘︎

sentences.english: I would miss my loving, erratic, harebrained mother.
sentences.chinese: 我会想念我那慈爱、善变又粗心大意的妈妈。
sentences.shadowing: I would MISS my LOVING / ERRATIC / HAREBRAINED MOTHER. ↘︎

sentences.english: Renée, come on. Guys, come on. I love you both. We got a plane to catch.
sentences.chinese: 蕾妮，快点。拜托，我爱你们，但我们要赶飞机呢。
sentences.shadowing: RENÉE / come‿ON. / GUYS / come‿ON. / I LOVE you BOTH. / We got‿a PLANE‿to CATCH. ↘︎

sentences.english: But they want to go on the road, so I'm gonna spend some time with my dad.
sentences.chinese: 但他们要出行，所以我要跟我爸住上一段时间。
sentences.shadowing: But they WANT‿to go‿on the ROAD / so‿I'm gonna SPEND some TIME with my DAD. ↘︎

sentences.english: and this will be a good thing
sentences.shadowing: and this will be a GOOD THING ↘︎

sentences.english: When the thorn bush turns white
sentences.shadowing: When the thorn bush TURNS WHITE ↘︎

sentences.english: I am going out to see what I can sow

sentences.shadowing: Iam going‿out to see WHAT I can SOW ↘︎

sentences.english: And I don't know where I'll go
sentences.shadowing: And‿I don't know WHERE I'LL go ↘︎

sentences.english: And I don't know what I'll see
sentences.chinese: 我也不知道我会看见什么

sentences.english: In the state of Washington, under a near-constant cover of clouds and rain,
sentences.chinese: 在华盛顿州，常年笼罩在乌云和雨水之下，
sentences.shadowing: In the STATE‿of WASHINGTON / under‿a near-CONSTANT COVER‿of CLOUDS‿and RAIN, ↘︎

sentences.english: there's a small town named Forks.
sentences.chinese: 有一个叫霍克斯的小镇

sentences.english: My dad's Charlie. He's the chief of police.

sentences.shadowing: My DAD's CHARLIE. / He's the CHIEF‿of POLICE. ↘︎

sentences.english: I haven't cut it since the last time I saw you.
sentences.chinese: 上一次见你后就没剪过了
sentences.shadowing: I haven't cut‿it since the last TIME I SAW you. ↘︎

sentences.english: I used to spend two weeks here almost every summer,
sentences.chinese: 我以前每个夏天都在这里住上两个星期
sentences.shadowing: I used to spend two weeks here almost‿EVERY SUMMER, ↘︎

sentences.chinese: 但那是很多年前的事了

sentences.english: I've cleared some shelves off in the bathroom.
sentences.chinese: 我把架子从浴室里拿走了
sentences.shadowing: I've cleared some shelves‿OFF in the BATHROOM. ↘︎

sentences.english: It's a pretty good work lamp.
The sales lady picked out the bed stuff.

sentences.shadowing: The sales lady picked‿out the BED STUFF. ↘︎

sentences.english: One of the best things about Charlie,
sentences.chinese: 查理的其中一个优点是
sentences.shadowing: One of the best things‿ABOUT CHARLIE, ↘︎

sentences.english: We heard you guys coming all the way down the road.
sentences.shadowing: We heard you guys coming‿all the way DOWN the ROAD. ↘︎

sentences.chinese: 贝拉你记得比利·布莱克吧－记得

sentences.shadowing: -Wow / you're looking good.-Well / I'm STILL DANCING. ↘︎

sentences.shadowing: Charlie here hasn't shut‿up‿about‿it since you told HIM you were COMING. ↘︎

sentences.english: All right, keep exaggerating. I'll roll you into the mud.

sentences.shadowing: All right / keep‿exaggerating. / I'll roll you INTO the MUD. ↘︎

sentences.shadowing: After‿I RAM you in the ANKLES. ↘︎

sentences.english: It's getting worse with old age. Good.
I totally rebuilt the engine for you.-Come on.

sentences.shadowing: but BESIDES that / you should be GOOD. ↘︎

I told them not to let me play.

你从亚利桑那州来的是吗

sentences.shadowing: Aren't people from‿Arizona supposed to be / like / REALLY TAN? ↗︎

Right? That's exactly what I thought. Yeah.

我们说得是奥运级人马

sentences.shadowing: They moved down here from‿Alaska / like / a few YEARS AGO. ↘︎

sentences.english: They kind of keep to themselves.

那个金发女郎叫罗莎莉

sentences.english: And the big dark-haired guy, Emmett, they're, like, a thing.

sentences.shadowing: but‿apparently nobody here's good‿ENOUGH for HIM. ↘︎
